title: lophiolepis sorocephala subsp. sorocephala
intro: Lophiolepis sorocephala subsp. sorocephala is a plant species of the genus Lophiolepis, commonly known as the "Tree Fern". It is a type of fern that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and digestive problems.
